title: Applied Machine Learning Engineer
summary: Join a small applied AI team building production decision systems for complex financial infrastructure workflows.
business_context: The team is translating research-heavy ideas into operational tools used by analysts and product partners.
must_have: Ability to turn research into production-facing tools
responsibilities: Translate ambiguous requirements into technical plans

title: ML Platform Engineer
summary: Build the internal tooling and deployment path for model teams across ranking, forecasting, and retrieval products.
business_context: The company needs stronger release quality, observability, and repeatability across a growing ML stack.
responsibilities: Own observability and incident learning loops

title: Research Engineer, Applied NLP
summary: Support a compact research group shipping evaluation-heavy NLP systems and custom model adaptation workflows.
business_context: The group values technical depth, paper literacy, and the ability to operationalize experiments without losing rigor.

title: Senior Data Scientist, Risk Systems
summary: Own risk decision models, experimental readouts, and stakeholder communication for a regulated analytics product.
business_context: This role sits closer to business decisioning than pure platform work and rewards candidates who can make tradeoffs legible.
responsibilities: Explain model decisions to non-technical partners
Prioritize between quality, speed, and operational constraints
